orient.description: Discover how Fullsend is installed in this repository, including available agents, harnesses, skills, workflows, and configuration sources.

trigger.description: Trigger an agent exposed by the repository's Fullsend installation by posting a verified /fs-* command on an issue or pull request.

watch.description: Monitor a Fullsend run associated with a run ID, issue, or pull request until it completes.

inspect.description: Inspect a Fullsend run's GitHub Actions status, logs, artifacts, output, and likely failure cause.

help.description: Answer a Fullsend user question from the current installation and link the relevant canonical upstream guide.
